subject: WM-0168 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified all prior findings closed: the 1424x861 Web gate now records production-assembled WorldReadModel activities only after the real Pixi activeRenderer.setReadModel call and independently reproduces moving ticks 3/6 plus working ticks 9/12; the raw inbound Worker proxy and Worker.prototype.addEventListener patch are absent; public browser-session lifecycle observation records created->initializing->active with closedCount=0 before cleanup and destroyed only after explicit cleanup. Independently reran real Chromium Worker 19/19: 600002.1ms, tick 0->18000, 10 advancing checkpoints, max gap 126.6ms, lifecycle 2+2 then idle, fatal/drop 0, reliable depth 2. Web 13/13, focused 44/44, 18k/100k zero leaks, boundaries/handoff/control checks and quality 462/462 pass; no production/protocol/schema/save/dependency changes. Low non-blocking report wording: it says no Worker prototype is patched, while the pre-existing outbound-only postMessage audit remains; this does not observe inbound lifecycle or drive authority.
